fixesApplied: Pushed the refactor page away from an even card rhythm by making the top section more asymmetric and adding a lower tail note register.
Redesigned the bestiary page around a dominant reusable hero specimen plate plus supporting illuminated callout, so the creature artifact leads the page rather than sitting as one card among many.
Reduced the competition between the bestiary illustration panel and the research stack by turning the lower image-tool task into a rendering-notes panel instead of a second rival illustration block.
residualRisks: The pages should now read closer to the references, but palette exactness and ornament choreography may still need one more pass.
Storybook motif-level configurability still lags behind the full page-level reconstruction work.
Some metadata and blueprint contrast combinations may still need another accessibility tightening pass.
reusableSurfacesTouched: shared bestiary hero specimen composition on the page via existing reusable surfaces
shared tail-note and hero-plate CSS vocabulary
